debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (quickSort α inst✝ l)

proof: induction l using quickSort.induct <;> simp [*] <;> grind
failed_attempts:
induction l using quickSort.induct
  · simp
  · next pivot l ih₁ ih₂ =>
    simp [*]
    rw [count_sum_above_below_pivot pivot]
    simp [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm]

induction l using quickSort.induct
  · simp
  · simp [*, count_sum_above_below_pivot, add_assoc, add_comm]

induction l using quickSort.induct
  case case1 => simp
  case case2 pivot l ih₁ ih₂ =>
    simp [ih₁, ih₂, count_sum_above_below_pivot, add_assoc, add_comm]

induction l using quickSort.induct <;> simp [*]
  rw [count_sum_above_below_pivot]
  omega
successful_attempts: induction l using quickSort.induct <;> simp [*] <;> grind
